name: Elemental HERO Dark Neos
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｅ・ＨＥＲＯ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エレメンタルヒーロー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ブラック・ネオス
desc:
"Elemental HERO Neos" + "Neo-Spacian Dark Panther"
Must first be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by shuffling the above cards you control into the Deck. You can target 1 face-up Effect Monster on the field; negate its effects while you control this face-up card. (You can only target 1 monster at a time with this effect.) Once per turn, during the End Phase: Return this card to the Extra Deck.

Once per turn, during the End Phase: Return this card to the Extra Deck.

sets.set: Legendary Collection 2: The Duel Academy Years Mega Pack

action: Returns Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion to Deck
Returns from field to Deck for Summon
Returns itself from field to Extra Deck
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
summoning: Requires only specific monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
